title: Product Giant Typography Campaign Poster AI
sourceTitle: Product Giant Typography Campaign Poster AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Platform Goal: Create one image asset for both Pinterest and X. It must work as a Pinterest Pin cover and as an X image-hook post that can anchor a prompt thread. Hero Subject: fictional running shoe as crisp hero product with runner in motion. Scene / Context: vertical 3:4 poster, huge word FLOW behind the product, blue and lime color system. Source Recipe Translation: product giant-typography campaign poster. Preserve these source mechanics: formal brand campaign hero visual, giant perspective typography as skeleton, young energetic product-launch layout. Concrete social variant uses fictional running shoe as crisp hero product with runner in motion in vertical 3:4 poster, huge word FLOW behind the product, blue and lime color system. Composition: vertical 4:5 or 2:3 social-poster composition with a strong central focal subject and clean negative space; Pinterest-first vertical 4:5 or 2:3 unless the source layout requires otherwise; keep the main subject readable in a small thumbnail and center-safe for X crop previews. Style System: formal brand campaign hero visual, giant perspective typography as skeleton, young energetic product-launch layout; polished editorial finish, strong first-glance contrast, clean hierarchy, no raw prompt text shown in the image. Visible Text: FLOW / Move in color; English-only readable text if text is part of the design; otherwise no visible text. Social Safety and Publishing Constraints: fictionalized social-safe version of the source prompt; adult-safe styling; real brands, logos, teams, and public-figure likenesses replaced with fictional/generic equivalents; no watermark, no random text, no real brand logo, no unauthorized celebrity likeness, no copied IP, no distorted anatomy, no clutter.

imagePrompts.prompt: Platform Goal: Create one image asset for both Pinterest and X. It must work as a Pinterest Pin cover and as an X image-hook post that can anchor a prompt thread. Classification: product giant-typography campaign poster. Hero Subject: fictional wireless earbuds campaign built around giant sculptural typography and a glossy product hero. Composition: vertical 3:4 commercial poster, huge readable headline behind the product, product centered with sharp negative space; Pinterest-first vertical 4:5 or 2:3 framing unless the source format is essential; keep the main subject readable at thumbnail size and center-safe for X previews. Style Language: high-resolution product advertising, giant dimensional typography, luxury tech campaign lighting, clean graphic hierarchy; high-contrast first-glance hook, polished editorial finish, clean visual hierarchy, no raw prompt text shown in the image. Visible Text: AURA PODS / LISTEN CLEAR; use English-only readable text if text is part of the design, otherwise no visible text. Distribution Fit: Designed for a Pinterest Pin cover and an X image post: strong single-image hook, clear subject, clean crop, readable text, and enough visual value to support a prompt-thread or pin description. Restrictions: fictional product only, no real brand logo, no copied product design, no broken text, no watermark, no clutter; no watermark, no random text, no real brand logo, no unauthorized celebrity likeness, no copied IP, no distorted anatomy, no clutter. Output: one polished finished image, no collage unless explicitly requested, no raw prompt text outside designed typography.
